final_prompt: A top-down view of a red-and-white checkered picnic blanket. Exactly five objects arranged in a circle: at the top, a shiny red apple; on the right, a blue ceramic mug with a handle; at the bottom, a curved yellow banana; on the left, a transparent green glass bottle; in the center, a small white plate. Bright natural sunlight from above, casting soft shadows.
